panelSubtitle: Pick a CLI first, then manage its Provider, MCP, and Skill launch combination
systemDefaultDescription: No Provider injected; respects the CLI's own config, CC Switch live config, and your environment. CC-Panes only adds its own MCP and Skill capabilities.
listScopeWorkspace: Showing only {{name}} bindings and the current default
listScopeAll: Launch profiles available to all workspaces
systemDefaultCardHint: No Provider injected; MCP / Skill defaults can be saved
listEmptyWorkspace: This workspace has no custom launch profile bound yet. Clicking “Add” creates one and binds it to the current workspace.
listEmptyAll: This CLI has no custom profile yet. Clicking “Add” creates a draft from the system default.
systemDefaultDetail: The {{tool}} system default is the launch baseline. No Provider is injected; MCP and Skill defaults can be saved for the current environment.
profileDetail: A launch profile combines Provider, MCP, and Skill for a single launch. It can be bound to a workspace or set as the current CLI's default.
sectionBasicDesc: Set an alias, restrict the applicable CLI, and choose the Provider to inject explicitly.
kimiNativeHint: Uses the ~/.kimi login state; no --config-file is passed and KIMI_SHARE_DIR is not injected at launch.
kimiManagedHint: Explicit Kimi Providers don't fully support model config yet; Provider selection is disabled.
runtimeHint: A launch profile belongs to the current CLI; the runtime location distinguishes Local, WSL, and SSH CLI configs.
sectionPermDesc: Set the CLI permission policy for this launch profile.
yoloDesc: Appends CLI bypass flags for this launch only; nothing is written to your Claude/Codex config.
yoloConfirmBody: This makes the CLI launched by this profile skip permission / sandbox checks (Claude: --dangerously-skip-permissions, Codex: bypass approvals and sandbox), which may run dangerous commands without confirmation. Only enable this when you fully trust the workspace.
yoloFootnote: Claude uses skip permissions; Codex uses bypass approvals and sandbox. Other CLIs save this flag but no unknown flags are appended.
sectionPreviewDesc: Resolve the final launch result for the selected workspace.
previewAfterSave: The resolved result appears after saving this launch profile.
previewCreateWorkspaceHint: Create or select a workspace to preview project Skills.
previewSelectWorkspaceHint: Select a workspace on the left to resolve project Skills for it.
sectionMcpDesc: Set the MCP combination injected when this profile launches.
mcpDisabledHint: This profile won't inject CC-Panes MCP or shared MCP.
mcpCustomHint: Custom mode injects only the shared MCP selected below.
mcpDefaultHint: The default set uses CC-Panes MCP and enables shared MCP not excluded from the library.
ccpanesMcpDesc: Injects CC-Panes' own task, workspace, and orchestration capabilities.
sharedMcpServiceDesc: Reuse configured MCP from the shared library.
sharedMcpEmpty: The shared library is empty. Add or import via “Manage shared MCP”.
sectionSkillDesc: Set the Skill combination injected when this profile launches.
skillDisabledHint: This profile won't inject CC-Panes built-in Skills, profile Skills, or workspace project Skills.
skillCustomHint: Custom mode injects only the Skills selected below.
skillDefaultHint: The default set enables CC-Panes built-in Skills and profile Skills, and can add workspace project Skills.
externalSkillHint: Core mode passes the external pool by default; Custom mode only allows checked items.
skillMarketHint: Recommended Skills install to your user library. They inject into this profile only after being installed and checked.
noMarketEntries: No recommendations available. Existing profiles are unaffected when offline or the official index is unavailable.
installTitle: Install to the user library and enable for this profile
installBlockedTitle: Missing license, contentUrl, or sha256; can't install yet
profileSkillHint: Saved in this profile and injected via CC-Panes session context at launch; not written to your project.
profileSkillDescPlaceholder: Work habits or role requirements to append when entering a session
profileSkillContentPlaceholder: Write the full instructions for this profile Skill.
profileSkillEmpty: No profile Skills yet. Click “Add” and it'll be saved with this profile.
projectSkillWorkspaceHint: Project Skills are written to the project's .claude/commands and included in previews for the current workspace.
projectSkillSelectHint: Select a workspace on the left to add or edit project Skills here.
noProjects: This workspace has no projects yet.

toast.draftCreated: Created a {{tool}} launch profile draft; save to apply
toast.profileSavedBound: Launch profile saved and bound to {{name}}
toast.profileSkillRequired: The profile Skill's name and content can't be empty
